← Back to app

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: July 17, 2026  ·  Last Updated: July 17, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Mongoose Films LLC, a Michigan limited liability company doing business as BidDrop ("BidDrop," "we," "us," or "our"), collects, uses, stores, and discloses information when you use the BidDrop platform at biddrop.us (the "Platform"). By using the Platform, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

1. Information We Collect

1.1 Information You Provide Directly

When you register for an account or use the Platform, we collect information you submit, including your name, business name, email address, phone number, billing address, and payment information. We also collect any content you upload or enter into the Platform, such as homeowner addresses, campaign names, and estimate data.

1.2 Information Collected Automatically

When you access the Platform, we automatically collect certain technical information, including your IP address, browser type and version, device type, operating system, pages visited, time spent on pages, and referring URLs. We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect this information and to maintain your session state.

1.3 Location Data

The Platform uses your device's location (with your permission) to center the map view and assist with property identification. We do not persistently store your precise GPS coordinates beyond what is necessary to render the map interface.

1.4 Homeowner Address Data

When you use the Platform to identify properties and queue postcards, you input or the Platform retrieves homeowner mailing addresses from third-party data sources. This address data is processed solely to fulfill your direct mail requests and is not used for any other purpose.

2. How We Use Your Information

PurposeLegal Basis
Providing and operating the PlatformPerformance of contract
Processing payments and managing subscriptionsPerformance of contract
Fulfilling direct mail postcard ordersPerformance of contract
Sending transactional emails (receipts, account notices)Performance of contract
Sending marketing emails (with your consent)Consent (opt-in)
Improving and developing Platform featuresLegitimate interest
Detecting and preventing fraud or abuseLegitimate interest
Complying with legal obligationsLegal obligation

We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We do not use your data to build advertising profiles or share it with advertising networks.

3. How We Share Your Information

Service Providers. We share information with third-party vendors who help us operate the Platform, including payment processors (Stripe), mail fulfillment partners (Lob, Inc.), cloud infrastructure providers (Supabase, Vercel), and CRM platforms (GoHighLevel). These providers are contractually required to use your information only as directed by BidDrop and in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

Legal Requirements. We may disclose your information if required to do so by law, court order, or governmental authority, or if we believe in good faith that disclosure is necessary to protect the rights, property, or safety of BidDrop, our users, or the public.

Business Transfers. In the event of a merger, acquisition, sale of assets, or other business transfer involving Mongoose Films LLC, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction. We will notify you via email or a prominent notice on the Platform before your information becomes subject to a different privacy policy.

4. Cookies and Tracking Technologies

BidDrop uses cookies and similar technologies to maintain your login session, remember your preferences, and analyze Platform usage. You may disable cookies through your browser settings, but doing so may impair certain Platform functionality, including the ability to remain logged in. We do not use third-party advertising cookies or cross-site tracking technologies.

5. Data Retention

We retain your account information and usage data for as long as your account is active and for a reasonable period thereafter to comply with legal obligations, resolve disputes, and enforce our agreements. Homeowner address data associated with completed postcard orders is retained for the period necessary to provide campaign analytics and then archived or deleted in accordance with our internal data retention schedule.

You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us at support@biddrop.io. Note that we may retain certain information as required by law or for legitimate business purposes even after account deletion.

6. Data Security

BidDrop implements industry-standard security measures to protect your information, including encrypted data transmission (TLS/HTTPS), access controls, and secure cloud infrastructure. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is completely secure. We cannot guarantee the absolute security of your information and disclaim liability for unauthorized access that occurs despite our reasonable precautions.

7. Children's Privacy

The Platform is not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If we become aware that we have collected information from a person under 18, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

8. Marketing Communications

If you opt in to marketing communications at the time of registration or at any later point, we may send you emails about new features, promotions, and company news. You may unsubscribe from marketing emails at any time by clicking the "Unsubscribe" link in any marketing email or by contacting us at support@biddrop.io.

Transactional emails — including billing receipts, account alerts, and service notifications — are sent as a necessary part of providing the Platform and cannot be opted out of while your account is active.

9. Third-Party Links and Services

The Platform may contain links to third-party websites or integrate with third-party services (such as GoHighLevel). This Privacy Policy does not apply to those third-party services. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party services you access through or in connection with the Platform.

10. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have certain rights with respect to your personal information, including the right to access, correct, or delete information we hold about you. To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at support@biddrop.io. We will respond to your request within a reasonable timeframe and in accordance with applicable law.

11. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated policy on the Platform and updating the "Last Updated" date above. Your continued use of the Platform after such changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised Privacy Policy.

12. Contact Us

If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

Mongoose Films LLC d/b/a BidDrop
Canton, Michigan
support@biddrop.io

This Privacy Policy is incorporated by reference into the BidDrop Terms of Service.
